items.briefing:
The Australian Cyber Security Centre (ACSC) has warned that credentials for Fortinet firewalls and VPN gateways have been exposed, meaning attackers could potentially access your organisation's network. If your workplace uses Fortinet products, IT staff should check for compromised credentials urgently. Separately, a Cloudflare report confirms Australian organisations — including civil society groups — are facing increasing cyberattacks, a reminder that no sector is too small to be targeted.

A new report also highlights that Australians are widely using AI tools but trust and safety standards haven't kept pace, which poses risks for staff sharing sensitive information with AI platforms.

**Practical tip:** Avoid entering work-related or personal sensitive information into public AI tools unless your organisation has approved them for that purpose.

featured.title: ACSC warns of reported credential exposure affecting Fortinet firewalls and VPN gateways
featured.quote: ACSC warns of widespread credential exposure affecting critical Fortinet firewalls and VPN gateways nationwide.
